ai.title: AI
ai.description: Local model (LM Studio or Ollama) used for AI drafting.
ai.connection_desc: The local inference server that powers AI generation.
ai.base_url_hint: OpenAI-compatible endpoint — LM Studio :1234, Ollama :11434. Reachable in local dev.
ai.model_desc: Pick which model generates drafts, and manage memory.
ai.model_hint: Load pins the model in memory; Unload frees it. Leave context at 0 for the model default.
ai.model_hint_ollama: Load keeps the model warm (keep-alive); Unload stops it. Ollama pulls models with `ollama pull`.
ai.pick_model: Pick a model to load first.
ai.no_loaded: No model is loaded to unload.
ai.generation_desc: Defaults applied to every AI draft request.
ai.generation_hint: Higher temperature is more creative; TTL auto-unloads the model after idle time.
